booking.name: Booking.com
booking._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join the Booking.com Affiliate Partner Programme at https://www.booking.com/affiliate-program/v2/index.html. After approval, your dashboard provides an Affiliate ID (aid) and lets you create tracking 'label' values. Put those in 'params' below.

getyourguide.name: GetYourGuide
getyourguide._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Apply to the GetYourGuide Partner Programme at https://partner.getyourguide.com/. Once approved you'll receive a partner_id (sometimes shown as CMP/partner ID). Put it in 'params' below.

viator.name: Viator
viator._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join the Viator Affiliate Programme (via the Viator Partner Hub / Partnerize) at https://www.viator.com/partner/affiliate. You'll get a partner id (pid). mcid and medium are standard Viator attribution values. Put them in 'params' below.

civitatis.name: Civitatis
civitatis._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Apply to the Civitatis Affiliate Programme at https://www.civitatis.com/en/affiliates/. After approval you'll get an affiliate id (aid). Put it in 'params' below.

trainline.name: Trainline
trainline._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join the Trainline Partner / Affiliate Programme at https://www.thetrainline.com/partners. After approval you'll get an affiliate id (aid). Put it in 'params' below.

skyscanner.name: Skyscanner
skyscanner._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join Skyscanner Partners at https://www.partners.skyscanner.net/ (runs on impact.com). After approval you'll get a mediaPartnerId — put it in params.affiliateId below. URL format follows their referrals browse-view: origin/destination accept a country code or IATA.

worldnomads.name: World Nomads
worldnomads._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join the World Nomads Affiliate Programme at https://www.worldnomads.com/travel-insurance/affiliates (run via their partner network). You'll receive an affiliate code. Put it in 'params' below.

airalo.name: Airalo
airalo._comment: WHERE TO REGISTER: Join the Airalo Partners / affiliate programme at https://www.airalo.com/partners (run via Partnerize). You'll receive an affiliate code (aff). Put it in 'params' below.
